_status: concept-draft - not an implemented mechanism, not a legal basis, not a legal opinion
title: Electronic voting schema draft
description: Schema-lite for conceptual metadata of future electronic voting in ngOs. This is not a validation schema, API contract or implemented voting mechanism.

resolution_id.description: Linked resolution or draft resolution identifier.

mode.description: Voting mode. Secret voting requires backend and legal/security review.

eligible_voter_ref.description: Reference to backend member registry snapshot used to establish eligible voters.

quorum_required.description: Whether quorum is required, or a reference to the quorum rule.

majority_type.description: Majority rule applied to the vote.

opened_at.description: Opening timestamp in ISO 8601 format, if implemented.

closed_at.description: Closing timestamp in ISO 8601 format, if implemented.

audit_log_ref.description: Reference to backend audit log. Public documents must not expose private logs.

statute_refs.description: References to statute JSON identifiers, e.g. statut:par_33.

legal_refs.description: References to legal corpus ledger entries.

notes: Secret voting cannot be implemented on a static frontend.
Binding voting requires backend identity, member registry, audit log and legal/security review.
